mapper.select:
SELECT w.task_classification_id AS taskClassificationId , NULL AS taskPriorityId , w.work_name AS workName , NULL AS priorityName , w.default_yn AS defaultYn , w.using_yn AS usingYn , w.order_no AS orderNo FROM work_classification w JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = w.company_id
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL AS taskClassificationId , t.task_priority_id AS taskPriorityId , NULL AS workName , t.priority_name AS priorityName , t.default_yn AS defaultYn , t.using_yn AS usingYn , t.order_no AS orderNo FROM task_priority t JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = t.company_id ORDER BY orderNo ASC NULLS LAST

choose.when: SELECT task_classification_id AS taskClassificationId, company_id AS companyId, work_name AS workName, default_yn AS defaultYn, using_yn AS usingYn FROM work_classification WHERE task_classification_id = #{vo.taskClassificationId}
choose.otherwise: SELECT task_priority_id AS taskPriorityId , company_id AS companyId , priority_name AS priorityName , default_yn AS defaultYn , using_yn AS usingYn FROM task_priority WHERE task_priority_id = #{vo.taskPriorityId}

mapper.select:
SELECT
work_name priority_name
FROM
work_classification task_priority
WHERE default_yn = 'Y'
AND
task_classification_id task_priority_id
!= #{cno}

SELECT task_classification_id AS taskClassificationId , w.work_name AS workName , NULL AS priorityName , default_yn AS defaultYn , using_yn AS usingYn , order_no AS orderNo FROM work_classification WHERE company_id = 1 ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
